```{r add_demre, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df[ranking > 0, ranking_pct := (frank(ranking, ties.method = "min") - 1L) / (.N - 1L), by = year_higher_ed_admission]
setDF(df)

df %<>% dplyr::mutate(
  prom_gral = coalesce(PROM_GRAL, 0),
  att = coalesce(ASISTENCIA, 0),
  scored_lm = coalesce(scored_lm, 0),
  prom_lm_actual = coalesce(lm_pct, 0),
  applied = coalesce(applied, 0),
  assigned = coalesce(assigned, 0),
  enrolled = coalesce(enrolled, 0),
  nem_pct = coalesce(nem_pct, 0),
  ranking_pct = coalesce(ranking_pct, 0),
  is_private = ifelse(COD_DEPE == 4, 1, 0)
)
saveRDS(df, "data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
```

```{r add_car, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Read and convert in-place (NO copy)
df <- readRDS("data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
setDT(df) # modifies in-place, 0 extra memory

# Read car and slim it immediately
car <- readRDS("data/panel_programs_2012_2025.rds")
setDT(car)
setnames(car, c("YEAR", "codigo_demre"), c("year", "codigo_carrera_seleccion"), skip_absent = TRUE)
keep_cols <- c(
  "codigo_carrera_seleccion", "year", "full_reg",
  grep("^selective_q.*_reg$|^top.*_reg$", names(car), value = TRUE)
)
car <- car[, ..keep_cols]
# Deduplicate car keys to ensure unique lookup
car <- unique(car, by = c("codigo_carrera_seleccion", "year"))
setkeyv(car, c("codigo_carrera_seleccion", "year"))

# --- Lookup-based merge: add columns to df by reference, NO full join copy ---
# Build the match index once (one integer vector, ~8 bytes per row of df)
idx <- car[
  data.table(
    codigo_carrera_seleccion = df$codigo_carrera_seleccion,
    year = df$year_higher_ed_admission
  ),
  on = .(codigo_carrera_seleccion, year),
  which = TRUE
]

# Add each car column to df by reference via the index
car_value_cols <- setdiff(names(car), c("codigo_carrera_seleccion", "year"))
for (col in car_value_cols) {
  set(df, j = col, value = car[[col]][idx])
}
rm(car, idx)
gc()

# Compute assigned_* columns one at a time via set() to avoid temporaries
reg_cols <- grep("^(selective_q|top|full).*_reg$", names(df), value = TRUE)
is_na_assigned <- is.na(df$assigned)
for (rc in reg_cols) {
  if (grepl("selective_q", rc)) {
    out_name <- paste0("assigned_", sub("selective_", "", sub("_reg$", "", rc)))
  } else if (grepl("^top", rc)) {
    out_name <- paste0("assigned_", sub("_reg$", "", rc))
  } else if (grepl("^full", rc)) {
    out_name <- "assigned_full_"
  } else {
    next
  }
  out_name <- paste0("assigned_", sub("_reg$", "", rc))
  val <- df$assigned * df[[rc]]
  val[is_na_assigned | is.na(df[[rc]])] <- 0
  set(df, j = out_name, value = val)
}
rm(val, is_na_assigned)

# assigned_not_full separately
set(df,
  j = "assigned_not_full",
  value = {
    v <- df$assigned * (1 - df$full_reg)
    v[is.na(v)] <- 0
    v
  }
)
if ("assigned_full_" %in% names(df)) set(df, j = "assigned_full_", value = NULL)

setDF(df)
gc()

saveRDS(df, "data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
```

```{r add_value_added, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df <- readRDS("data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
setDT(df)

va <- readRDS("data/value_added_simce_2m_relative_8b_2016.rds")
setDT(va)

# Compute quantile thresholds (scalar, no grouping needed)
q_vals <- quantile(va$va, c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
va[!is.na(va), `:=`(
  top_25_va = as.integer(va >= q_vals[1]),
  top_50_va = as.integer(va >= q_vals[2]),
  top_75_va = as.integer(va >= q_vals[3]),
  top_90_va = as.integer(va >= q_vals[4]),
  top_99_va = as.integer(va >= q_vals[5])
)]

# Index lookup — no join copy
setkey(va, rbd)
idx <- va[.(df$RBD), on = .(rbd), which = TRUE]

top_cols <- grep("^top_.*_va$", names(va), value = TRUE)
for (col in top_cols) {
  set(df, j = col, value = va[[col]][idx])
}
rm(va, idx, q_vals)

setDF(df)
gc()

saveRDS(df, "data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
```

```{r add_simce4b, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
df <- readRDS("data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
setDT(df)

s4b <- readRDS("data/panel_simce_4b.rds")
setDT(s4b)

# Rename columns in s4b: append _4b to cols that don't already have it
s4b_cols <- setdiff(names(s4b), "mrun")
new_names <- fifelse(grepl("4b", s4b_cols), s4b_cols, paste0(s4b_cols, "_4b"))
setnames(s4b, s4b_cols, new_names)
setnames(s4b, c("mrun", "year_4b"), c("MRUN", "AGNO"), skip_absent = TRUE)

# Index lookup — no join copy
setkeyv(s4b, c("MRUN", "AGNO"))
idx <- s4b[.(df$MRUN, df$AGNO), on = .(MRUN, AGNO), which = TRUE]

merge_cols <- setdiff(names(s4b), c("MRUN", "AGNO"))
for (col in merge_cols) {
  set(df, j = col, value = s4b[[col]][idx])
}
rm(s4b, idx, merge_cols, s4b_cols, new_names)
gc()

# Low-score indicators
set(df, j = "low_lect4b", value = as.integer(df$ptje_lect4b_alu <= df$median_lect4b))
set(df, j = "low_mate4b", value = as.integer(df$ptje_mate4b_alu <= df$median_mate4b))

setDF(df)
saveRDS(df, "data/panel_9-12_2010_2021_v4.rds")
```
